prompt: Top-down 9:16 in-game screenshot of Push'em All: a single blue stickman hero (#2a7dfa) standing at the edge of a narrow sandy-green platform (#56a38b) surrounded by vibrant blue water, expanding push-stick rotating around him, a dense crowd of bright red stickman enemies (#e3001b) charging from the far end. Authentic HUD: level progress timeline at top, 'COMBO x7' text mid-screen in bold white, coin counter top-right. Minimalist 3D with bright, contrasting colors and simple stickman-like figures, flat shading, no textures. Bold overlay text reads 'WHY IS THIS LEVEL SO HARD?' across the upper third. [Audio: VO (anxious male) 'Why is this level so hard?!' / 130bpm punchy competitive trap with rising tension synth / whoosh on stick spin at 0.5s, crowd-stomp loop, combo chime at 2s]
